LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.QuickGuide.Title: Quick Setup:
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.QuickGuide.Step2: 2. Get OAuth token from Twitch Token Generator
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.QuickGuide.Tooltip: Simple 3-step setup guide for Twitch integration
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.EnableIntegrationTooltip2: When disabled, the mod will not connect to Twitch chat\n
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.EnableIntegrationTooltip3: and all Twitch-related features will be inactive.
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.ChannelNameTooltip.Title: Your Twitch Channel Name
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.ChannelNameTooltip.Desc: This is the username that appears in your stream URL.
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.ChannelNameTooltip.Example1: If your URL is twitch.tv/superstreamer → enter 'superstreamer'
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.ChannelNameTooltip.Warning: Note: This is your channel username, not your display name.
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.ChannelNameFieldTooltip: Enter your Twitch channel name here
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.BotAccountStatus.Main: ⚠ Using main streamer account as bot
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.BotUsernameTooltip.Title: Bot Account Username
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.BotUsernameTooltip.Recommend: Recommended: Use a separate bot account
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.BotUsernameTooltip.Alternati: Alternative: Use your main streamer account
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.BotUsernameTooltip.WhyHeader: Why use a separate bot account?
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.BotUsernameTooltip.Why1: Keeps chat cleaner (bot messages are separate)
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.BotUsernameTooltip.Why2: Prevents accidental commands from your own account
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.BotUsernameTooltip.Main2: You will see your own messages in chat
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.AccessTokenFieldTooltip: Twitch OAuth token (hidden for security).\nSelect text to copy, or use buttons below to paste/set.
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.PasteTokenTooltip: Paste OAuth token from clipboard (auto-adds 'oauth:' if missing)
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.ClearTokenTooltip: Remove the current Twitch OAuth token
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.GetTokenButtonTooltip: Open Twitch Token Generator to get your OAuth token (with instructions)
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.TokenGeneratorStep3: • Use your BOT account if you have one
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.TokenGeneratorStep4: • Or use your MAIN streamer account
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.TokenGeneratorSecurityNote3: • This token only allows chat access
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.TokenGeneratorSecurityNote4: • Keep it private like a password
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.AutoConnectTooltip: Automatically connect to Twitch chat when the application starts
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.ConnectedTooltip4: The mod is now listening for chat commands\nand processing viewer interactions.
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.DisconnectedTooltipStatus: RICS is not currently connected to Twitch chat.
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.MissingSettingsTooltip: Fix these missing settings to connect
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.TipsWhispersNotWorking: • Whispers not working? Regenerate token with 'whispers:read' scope
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.TipsTokenIssue: • Token not working? Regenerate at Twitch Token Generator
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.TipsBotIssue: • Bot not joining? Check channel name spelling
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.TipsOwnMessages: • See your own messages? That's normal with main account
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.TokenTypeTooltip: Shows which account this token was generated for
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.UseWhisperForCommandsTooltip: Allow viewers to send commands via whispers (private messages). Default: ON - Viewers can whisper commands. Disable: Only allow commands in public chat.
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.ForceUseWhisperTooltip: Force viewers to use whispers for ALL commands (reduces chat clutter). ON: Commands in public chat are ignored. OFF: Commands work in both chat and whispers. Note: When enabled, a reminder message will be sent periodically.
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.WhisperReminderTimerTooltip: How often to remind viewers to use whispers (in seconds). 0 = Never send reminders. 300 = 5 minutes (recommended). When "Force whisper-only commands" is enabled, this controls how often the reminder message appears in chat.
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.WhisperReminderDisabled: Reminder: Disabled (no chat messages will be sent)
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.WhisperLimitationNote: ⚠️ For whispers to work: Token needs 'whispers:read' scope
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.WhisperLimitationTooltip: Whisper Requirements: • Your token MUST include 'whispers:read' scope • Use Twitch Token Generator → "Custom Scope" • Check ALL THREE boxes: chat:read, whispers:read, chat:edit • Without 'whispers:read', you won't receive whispers! • Bots can only reply to whispers from users they follow (Twitch restriction)
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.ClientIdTooltip: FASTEST WAY: Click the Get Token button above! • Your Client ID appears right below the Access Token on that page • (exactly as shown in the screenshot you just shared) Client ID is PUBLIC and SAFE • Not a secret — every Twitch app uses it openly • Only your Access Token must stay private
LanguageData.RICS.Twitch.TokenGeneratorClientIdDesc: It appears right below your Access Token on the same page.
